a.xlink:title: Base class for converting physics events into graph representations.
Provides a wide range of utility functions used throughout the framework.
Provides properties and methods for metadata management.
Base class for representing physics particles with four-momentum and properties.

A template class implementing a property system with getter/setter callbacks.
Provides logging and messaging functionality with various severity levels.
Main structure for storing metadata about physics datasets.
